zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg於1129年出生在德國薩辛德累斯頓時，她的父親Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg30歲，母親Sophie von Winzenburg21歲。她和Děpolt I Přemyslovec至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1181年在德國享年52歲。

zh-hans.Moravské Budějovice, Třebíč, Tschechoslo: 捷克斯洛伐克特熱比奇莫拉福斯凱 布e喬維其
zh-hans.Jemnice, Budejovice Moravske, Czechoslov: 捷克斯洛伐克斯特拉康尼斯姆尼斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg于1129年出生在德国薩辛德累斯頓时，她的父亲Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg30岁，母亲Sophie von Winzenburg21岁。她和Děpolt I Přemyslovec至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1181年在德国享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

nameMeanings.name: Sibylle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alain, Etienne, Jean-Michael.
French: from the female personal name Sibille, from Greek Sibylla (see Sibley ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg was born in 1129, in Dresden, Saxony, Germany, her father, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, was 30 and her mother, Sophie von Winzenburg, was 21. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Děpolt I Přemyslovec. She died in 1181, in Germany, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg est née en 1129, à Dresden, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sophie von Winzenburg, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Děpolt I Přemyslovec. Elle est décédée en 1181, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg 1129 in Dresden, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg 30 und ihre Mutter Sophie von Winzenburg 21. Sie hatte mit Děpolt I Přemyslovec mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1181 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg è nata il nel 1129 nel Dresden, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Sophie von Winzenburg, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Děpolt I Přemyslovec. Morì nel 1181, nel Germania, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburgが1129年にドイツサチセンドレスデンで生まれた時，父Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburgは30歳，母Sophie von Winzenburgは21歳であった。彼女はDěpolt I Přemyslovecとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1181年にドイツで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg(이)가 1129년 독일 작센 드레즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophie von Winzenburg(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Děpolt I Přemyslovec(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1181년 독일에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg nasceu em 1129, em Dresden, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sophie von Winzenburg, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Děpolt I Přemyslovec. Ela faleceu em 1181, em Alemanha, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg родилась в 1129 г. в местности дресден, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie von Winzenburg, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Děpolt I Přemyslovec. Она умерла в 1181 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude Sibylle Askanier von Brandenburg nació en 1129, en Dresden, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sophie von Winzenburg, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Děpolt I Přemyslovec. Murió en 1181, en Alemania, a la edad de 52 años.
